rationale: Both correctly reach the thread's actual resolution (invalid — wrong --run-level, load_format:dummy patched in via PR #4354), with plausible code-path grounding (run_args.py, stage_config.py, runtime.py). Y is more complete: it addresses the audio-similarity assertion too, catches the real A100-vs-H100/MI325 hardware mismatch from the @hardware_test decorator in the issue body (which X misses entirely), and adds an actionable footgun-prevention suggestion. Y loses some grounding credit for inventing a specific Welsh audio-transcript quote not present in the (truncated) log, which X avoids by sticking to what's actually shown.
